name: Uematsu Shokai Co.,Ltd.
summary: Uematsu Shokai Co.,Ltd., a direct sales trading company, provides machine tools and industrial machinery in Japan. The company offers NC/MC machine tools, electric discharge machines/grinders, and various FA systems; and logistic, hydraulic/pneumatic, labor-saving automation system, and FA system equipment. It also provides machine tool accessories, such as NC/MC peripherals, cutting tools, measurement equipment, and various machine equipment; bearings/motors, conductors, reducers, and transmissions; and environmental loading reduction devices and RDV systems. Uematsu Shokai Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Sendai, Japan.
